evidence.claim: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using OpenAI embeddings and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning through shipping real systems over academic background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Pragmatic approach to debugging and signal identification
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.

evidence.claim: Proficiency in various ML and search technologies including Semantic Search, BM25, MLOps, OpenSearch, LlamaIndex, scikit-learn, PyTorch, Weaviate, MLflow, LoRA, Sentence Transformers, Reinforcement Learning, and Speech Recognition
evidence.source_text: Skills: Semantic Search (advanced, 21mo, 56 endorsements); BM25 (expert, 64mo, 54 endorsements); MLOps (intermediate, 20mo, 15 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 78mo, 53 endorsements); Recommendation Systems (expert, 40mo, 47 endorsements); LlamaIndex (expert, 45mo, 3 endorsements); scikit-learn (expert, 42mo, 38 endorsements); GCP (beginner, 8mo, 12 endorsements); Docker (beginner, 5mo, 15 endorsements); PyTorch (advanced, 25mo, 3 endorsements); Weaviate (expert, 57mo, 52 endorsements); MLflow (intermediate, 33mo, 9 endorsements); LoRA (expert, 86mo, 60 endorsements); Sentence Transformers (expert, 68mo, 9 endorsements); Reinforcement Learning (advanced, 53mo, 15 endorsements); Speech Recognition (advanced, 41mo, 34 endorsements); Information Retrieval (expert, 80mo, 37 endorsements)
